title: KADAX Flower Bowl, Outdoor Planter, Weatherproof Plastic Flowerpot in various sizes, Round Plant Pot for Garden, Balcony and Terrace, Durable Pot (⌀34 cm, Anthracite)
features: Outdoor: The unique and solidly made plant pot is perfect for various outdoor spaces such as balconies, terraces, gardens, and even cemeteries. Giving you the opportunity to add colour and a sense of freshness to your surroundings.
Weather resistance: The bowl is able to withstand harsh weather conditions like rain, snow, frost, and strong winds, making it an excellent option for outdoor locations.
High durability: The flower bowl is constructed from top-grade plastic, which is lightweight and highly durable. It is resistant to moisture, scratches, and impacts.
Versatile: This round flower bowl is an excellent option not only for creating unique flower arrangements, but also for planting herbs, shrubs, small vegetables and fruits.

Many variants: In our range you will find the flower bowl in up to five sizes to meet your specific needs. Available in two colours that will certainly enhance any outdoor area: terracotta and anthracite.
description: Product Description The unique and solidly made flower bowl is ideal for both on the balcony, on the terrace or in the garden as well as in the cemetery. In this flower bowl you can plant plants, flowers and even small shrubs that decorate the environment and provide colour and fresh character. The sturdy base stands firmly on the floor and prevents wobbling. This flower bowl is part of the basic equipment of every passionate gardener. Round flower bowl. The plant pot has no sharp ends, so children who want to help their parents or grandparents in the garden cannot hurt themselves. Besides, it is not as deep as it seems, which contributes to comfortable planting of flowers. The aesthetic flower pot is not only extremely practical, but also looks very attractive in the garden, on the balcony or on the terrace, especially with a striking plant. Advantages: Universality. Pelargonia, pansies, petunias, begonia, fuchsia or nobilaca can grow in the flower pot. Thanks to our universal product, the environment of our house can be made in many ways. Easy to carry. The curved curves around the plant bowl allow for loose and safe carrying or lifting. Lightness. The plant bowl is ideal for garden flowers and flower arrangements and is very light, which positively influences the comfort of use. Information: Dimensions: Diameter: 34 cm. Height: 15 cm. Information In the vessels without drainage holes, we need drainage, e.g. Keramsit or Agroperlite, which loosen the soil, aerate and store water. In case of moisture overflow, the drainage absorbs it and when the soil is dry it returns. Material: Plastic. The useful flower bowl is made of high quality plastic that is resistant and resistant to scratches, knocks or bumps. The material is also robust against the effects of adverse weather such as rain, snow, frost or gusty wind. It protects the plant bowl from moisture – this feature is particularly useful when watering flowers.
